description: Negative fixture cases for the stable claim manifest gate. Each case is a complete manifest that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_stable_claim_manifest.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id. These cases keep the lifecycle-label narrowing and packet-freshness-SLO rejections honest even if the canonical manifest changes shape.

cases.summary: An entry whose manifest state forces narrowing still publishes its claimed lifecycle label instead of narrowing below the cutline.
A published entry rides a proof packet whose freshness-SLO state is breached, so the packet-freshness automation must narrow it before publication.
